RFID Smart Automation

When enabled, the system automatically assigns the next available RFID tag to students once their registration is 'Approved' and documents are verified.

Hardware Sync: Tags scanned by the RDM6300 reader that are not in inventory will be automatically registered as 'Available' in the pool.

System Configurations & Settings
System Maintenance

Use these tools to keep the system organized and clear space. These tasks also run automatically every week.

Data Management Tools

Standardizes all dates in core sheets to DD/MM/YYYY. Intelligently detects and skips entries already following this format.

Danger Zone

Enter Registration ID, Phone, or University Reg No. This will mark the student as Blacklisted and highlight their record in red. Data is preserved but access is revoked.

      Slot Timing Logic & Priority Hierarchy

      Use the UP and DOWN buttons to configure the logical evaluation order in which slot timings are evaluated. The system processes rules from top to bottom and applies the first matching rule.

      • Loading priority settings...
